title: Twilight Fountains
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Twilight Fountains''' were fountains on [[Talo Square]] in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Sath]]. The fountains changed [[Color/Legends|color]] across the spectrum, including aquamarine, gold, orange, and navy blue.

In [[18 BBY/Legends|18 BBY]], the Samarian resistance chose the fountains as a new meeting location, as the resistance's old drop spot had been used for over a month. [[Ferus Olin]] once met [[Nek (resistance)|Nek]] at the Twilight Fountains to discuss resistance matters. Later, Olin dropped off [[Trever Flume]] at the fountains in an [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeder]], before [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] called Olin back to his work.

{{Loc-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The Twilight Fountains are first referred to as the singular "Twilight Fountain" in [[The Last of the Jedi: Return of the Dark Side|''Return of the Dark Side'']]. Later appearances in the book, however, use the plural form.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Last of the Jedi: Return of the Dark Side]]''
